slides.title: *Program* hopping
slides.body: Pick a plan and run it for months.

slides.title: Ego *lifting*
slides.body: Half reps with bad form build nothing.

slides.title: Skipping *protein*
slides.body: You won't grow without enough of it.

slides.title: No *progression*
slides.body: Add reps or weight. Don't stay comfy.

slides.title: Doing *too much*
slides.body: Three solid days beats six junk ones.

slides.title: Start *right*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your training, protein and sleep from day one.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
5 mistakes killing your newbie gains. 💪

Save this and put it to work. 🔖
